description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a medium gray fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The sofa consists of two main seating sections: a longer two-seat segment and a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The backrests and seat cushions are uniform in size and thickness, with a smooth, tailored appearance and no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The sofa is supported by slender, black metal legs that are slightly recessed, giving it a floating effect and enhancing its contemporary style. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with foam cushioning for comfort, making it suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with clean lines, uniform cushions, and slim black metal legs. Features a chaise lounge extension and low, straight armrests for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, with both seat sections, backrests, and armrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the straight, padded armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with no visible armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the longer seat section and the left armrest, with the chaise lounge receding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four seat cushions and three back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with no visible tufting or variation.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests present on both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a simple rectangular profile and padded surface.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and central support points, slightly recessed for a floating appearance, with a minimalist, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest composed of three uniform, attached cushions with a smooth, unembellished surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid medium gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
